description: Storecove provides e-invoicing infrastructure for sending, receiving, and routing business documents such as invoices across networks like Peppol. Its platform helps ERP and finance systems integrate compliant electronic document exchange across countries and formats.
summary: Storecove exposes one authenticated REST API at https://api.storecove.com/api/v2, documented at /docs and described by a published OpenAPI document; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI surfaced.
